summary: PR #94015 is the canonical repair path for linked issue #79521, but it is not merge-ready in this job: merge is disallowed, Codex /review proof is missing, and the hydrated PR checks include failures in checks-node-core-fast and check-test-types. Because the PR branch is maintainer-editable and the diff is narrow, the executable path is to repair the contributor branch, preserve xialonglee's credit, run focused voice-call regression proof plus pnpm check:changed, then rerun /review.

actions.reason: Canonical contributor PR exists and is maintainer-editable, but it needs repair/validation before it can be considered landable.
Issue is covered by the canonical repair PR, but closure is blocked until a fix lands.
Build a cluster-scoped executable repair plan for the maintainer-editable contributor PR.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #94015 on the contributor branch so voice-call TTS consumes pre-compaction onBlockReply payloads instead of waiting for or trusting stale post-compaction result.payloads. Keep the change limited to voice-call response generation and its regression test.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the existing contributor PR #94015 so voice-call response generation captures embedded-agent `onBlockReply` payloads before post-turn compaction can delay or stale the aggregate result.
- Keep TTS policy, compaction policy, and voice-call configuration unchanged.
- Add or tighten the focused regression proving voice-call can extract the spoken response from pre-compaction payloads even when the completed embedded-agent result is empty or stale.

## Credit
This carries forward the source PR and implementation credit from xialonglee in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94015.

## Verification
- `pnpm test extensions/voice-call/src/response-generator.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Codex `/review` clean after repair

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/79521.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94015 by xialonglee.
PR body and any later release-note context should credit the original contributor fix path from #94015.
